text: Brent > 75 #oott

In a uptrend 200 day moving average is good time to take a bet if you are wrong market will give you a chance to get out for a small loss. So far these names are bouncing very hard on high volume! #oott
quoted_text: Oil and gas Energy stocks are 3-4% of the entire stock market now. So 4 months ago these stocks all went up 40-50% they were all trading below 200-day moving average and they all blew past that average now all of them pulled back to that range. I am no TA but been doing this for couple of decades I use 200 day moving average as a risk-management or timing tool, even if it doesn’t work to determine a company’s intrinsic value. The moving average can help gauge market sentiment without replacing f
